name: Mackenzie Estratton
message:
I had the privilege of having Brenda do my makeup and hair for a work event. She went above and beyond to accommodate me and made me feel so comfortable and welcomed.

Not only was the experience amazing, but the final result was too! I absolutely loved my makeup and hair. Brenda really listened to what I wanted and, with her expertise, she nailed the final result.

I couldn't recommend Brenda more highly and will definitely be booking with her again!

name: Neide
message:
If there was ever a day I felt my most beautiful, this was it.

Brenda is an artist. Yes, a makeup and hair artist, but what she really does is help you feel beautiful and completely comfortable being yourself. I'm a very low-maintenance, barely-wear-makeup kind of girl, so I was worried I wouldn't feel like me. Instead, I felt like the best version of myself (and yes, I absolutely loved the pink lipstick!).

My hair was exactly how I imagined it, and both my hair and makeup lasted all day, even through a super humid afternoon. Honestly, I didn't want to take it off at the end of the night, I think I was trying to make the day last a little longer! Haha.

When I saw myself in the mirror, I couldn't stop smiling. I felt beautiful, confident, and still completely like myself. Even my bridesmaids were surprised, in the best way possible! They kept saying how amazing I looked, and for once, I actually believed it.

From the very first trial, I could see how much Brenda loves what she does and how experienced she is. But beyond her talent, she brings such a calm and positive energy. She keeps you relaxed, cheers you on, gives you that little extra confidence when you need it, and reminds you that it's your special day.

I would recommend Brenda a million times. Thank you for making me feel so beautiful and so special.

name: Nara Fernandes
message:
I absolutely loved my experience with Brenda from start to finish. Before the appointment, I was excited but also a little nervous because I wanted everything to look perfect.
The makeup was absolutely beautiful and exactly what I was hoping for. It enhanced my features while still looking natural and elegant.
The makeup lasted incredibly well throughout the entire event and still looked amazing hours later. I didn't have to worry about touch-ups, which was a huge plus.
Your professionalism, attention to detail, and warm personality made the whole experience enjoyable. I could tell how much care and passion you put into your work.
When I saw the final result, I was genuinely so happy. I felt beautiful, confident, and received so many compliments.
I would absolutely recommend your services. Not only are you incredibly talented, but you also create such a lovely and welcoming experience. Thank you for making me feel so special!
❤️🥰

name: Juliana Dias
message: I couldn't have chosen a better person to take care of me on my wedding day. My hair looked flawless, exactly the way I had dreamed of and just how I like it. The makeup was perfect and lasted throughout the entire celebration! When I went to remove it, it was still practically intact. Besides being an incredible professional, she is extremely attentive and careful, both with our hair and our skin. You can truly see the care and dedication she puts into every detail.
